title: Feature Root: Commit upgraded assets during `takt upgrade`
description: Shared execution root for wiring `commit_scaffold()` into `command_upgrade`, covering the runtime change, regression tests, user-facing documentation updates, and final review.
acceptance_criteria: `takt upgrade` calls `commit_scaffold(root, console)` after writing upgrade outputs when `dry_run` is false.
`takt upgrade --dry-run` does not commit and emits a dim `[dry-run] would commit upgraded assets` notice.
No empty commit is created when there are no managed-asset changes; existing `commit_scaffold()` behavior is reused.
The implementation is covered by automated tests for the non-dry-run and dry-run paths.
Documentation and review confirm the behavior matches the spec and existing `takt init` scaffold semantics.
